headings.text: Live in 48 hours. Pipeline in two weeks.
Most teams see their first qualified signal within 6 working hours.
Talk to a signal architect — 20 minutes, no slides.

paragraphs.text: No long implementation. No services contracts. Connect your CRM, draw your ICP, set the signal thresholds that matter — and let Lumivex hand your reps a working queue by Friday.
One-click OAuth into Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, or Attio. We mirror accounts, opportunities and owner mappings in under three minutes.
Use the visual ICP builder to set firmographics, tech-stack signals, and exclusion rules. Import an existing target list to seed the model.
Choose which intent signals trigger an alert — funding events, hiring spikes, vendor churn, web sessions. Pick a scoring floor and routing rules.
A solutions engineer reviews your config, validates routing, and flips the switch. Your first qualified signals land in Slack and your CRM the same day.
Start a 14-day trial with 250 fully enriched signals on your domain. Talk to your reps about real accounts — not theoretical ones.
A named onboarding lead walks you through CRM mapping, ICP review, and Slack routing on a single 45-minute call. After that — you're driving.
Every signal Lumivex serves is sourced, processed, and routed under enterprise-grade controls. The receipts:
Signal intelligence for growth teams who refuse to wait for the hand-raise.

visibleText: Lumivex Ignite Platform Results Pricing Onboard Sign in Get Started Onboarding · 48-hour activation Live in 48 hours . Pipeline in two weeks . No long implementation. No services contracts. Connect your CRM, draw your ICP, set the signal thresholds that matter — and let Lumivex hand your reps a working queue by Friday. Your 4-step path From signup to first signal. 1 Connect your CRM One-click OAuth into Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, or Attio. We mirror accounts, opportunities and owner mappings in under three minutes. ⏱ ~ 3 minutes 2 Define your ICP Use the visual ICP builder to set firmographics, tech-stack signals, and exclusion rules. Import an existing target list to seed the model. ⏱ ~ 20 minutes 3 Set signal thresholds Choose which intent signals trigger an alert — funding events, hiring spikes, vendor churn, web sessions. Pick a scoring floor and routing rules. ⏱ ~ 30 minutes 4 Go live in 48 hours A solutions engineer reviews your config, validates routing, and flips the switch. Your first qualified signals land in Slack and your CRM the same day. ⏱ ~ 48 hours end-to-end Free · No credit card Claim your free signals.
